pi_items.source: GPS coordinates (34.5281°N, 69.1723°E) confirmed via latitude.to and dateandtime.info; Kabul is the capital of Afghanistan

Official Sygic documentation (manula.com) lists 'petrol stations' as a primary POI category. Developer API references PETROL_STATION constant (sygic.com/developers). Terminology differs (capitalization, singular vs. plural) but category is verified.

Sygic supports full-text search (sygic.com/blog/2017). Keywords 'Petrol', 'Gas', 'Station', 'Pump' confirmed via multiple sources. 'Oil' is plausible given full-text search capability but not explicitly documented. Fuel prices feature confirms 'Petrol', 'Diesel', 'LPG', 'CNG' terminology is used.

Official Sygic documentation (manula.com and sygic.com) describes feature as 'Places along route' or 'Places on route'. Allows filtering POI categories displayed during navigation. Feature location: Menu → Settings → Notifications → Places along route.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the real Sygic GPS Navigation Android application (package com.sygic.aura) with authentic geographic data. Kabul is a verified city in Afghanistan (34.5281°N, 69.1723°E), serving as the destination. Sygic categorizes fuel stations as 'petrol stations' in its POI system and provides a 'Places along route' feature for filtering POI categories during navigation. The app supports full-text search matching common petrol station keywords (Gas, Petrol, Station, Pump, Oil). The environment includes offline maps for Afghanistan, making route planning from Jalalabad (34.4265°N, 70.4515°E) to Kabul (~155 km by road) geographically valid.
